name: Glass Effect New Tab
description: Glass-style new tab dashboard. Search uses Chrome Search API and respects the user's default search engine.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.openstreetmap.org https://*.openstreetmap.org https://www.youtube.com https://*.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com https://*.youtube-nocookie.com https://music.youtube.com https://open.spotify.com https://*.open.spotify.com https://soundcloud.com https://*.soundcloud.com https://w.soundcloud.com
